statusVocabulary.Pass: The named command completed and its raw evidence is retained.
statusVocabulary.EvidencePresent: The source/test or prior local evidence is present, but it is not sufficient for release sign-off.
statusVocabulary.PartialPass: The local slice is covered while one or more required acceptance dimensions remain blocked.
statusVocabulary.Blocked: A required external environment, authorization, maintenance window, or evidence artifact is unavailable.
statusVocabulary.Fail: The named command or acceptance assertion failed.

issues.title: Performance SLO
issues.localCommand: dotnet test backend/AsterERP.Api.Tests/AsterERP.Api.Tests.csproj --configuration Release --no-restore --filter FullyQualifiedName~LowCodePerformanceBenchmarkTests; npm test --prefix frontend/AsterERP.Web -- --run src/pages/application-console/development-center/low-code-studio/testing/performance/lowCodePerformanceBenchmark.test.ts --reporter=json --outputFile=../../artifacts/low-code-performance/frontend-test.json
issues.passCondition: Backend TRX and frontend JSON exist; every node-count scenario reports p95 within the documented budget.
issues.blockedCondition: No retained repeated Release run and no authorized browser/provider performance evidence.

issues.title: Idempotency, recovery and cancellation
issues.passCondition: Idempotent save/publish, stale-write conflict, cancellation and ledger recovery assertions pass.
issues.blockedCondition: No authorized maintenance window, backup snapshot, real-provider timeout run, or restore rehearsal.

issues.title: Security gates
issues.localCommand: dotnet test backend/AsterERP.Api.Tests/AsterERP.Api.Tests.csproj --configuration Release --no-restore --filter "FullyQualifiedName~HAO107SecurityGateTests|FullyQualifiedName~ApplicationDataSourceSecurityBoundaryTests"; npm test --prefix frontend/AsterERP.Web -- --run src/shared/runtime/designer-document/runtimeSecurityPolicy.test.ts
issues.passCondition: Unsafe document/artifact inputs, secret echo, path traversal and dynamic execution guards pass.
externalEvidence: secret and SQLite sandbox production trace
issues.blockedCondition: Local tests do not prove deployed authorization, tenant isolation, or production secret/path handling.

issues.title: Accessibility and i18n
issues.passCondition: Loading, error, 403/404, keyboard semantics and alert semantics assertions pass.
externalEvidence: Page Studio/Data Studio visual and i18n review
issues.blockedCondition: No retained authorized browser accessibility, visual, responsive, or i18n evidence.

issues.title: Observability events
issues.localCommand: dotnet test backend/AsterERP.Api.Tests/AsterERP.Api.Tests.csproj --configuration Release --no-restore --filter FullyQualifiedName~LowCodeObservabilityGuardTests; npm test --prefix frontend/AsterERP.Web -- --run src/runtime-kernel/RuntimeMonitoringContract.test.ts
issues.passCondition: Known event names, required context, redaction and cancellation fields validate.
issues.blockedCondition: No production telemetry export or alert retrieval evidence is present.

issues.title: CI test matrix
issues.passCondition: The validator finds exactly HAO-105..110, all referenced check files exist, and CI executes every named local gate.
externalEvidence: green CI run with retained TRX/JSON artifacts
controlled external evidence artifacts under artifacts/low-code-external
issues.blockedCondition: A static workflow or matrix validation is not a CI execution result; no retained CI run with external evidence is available.

extendedIssues.title: Page Studio acceptance
extendedIssues.passCondition: Page Studio logic cases and authorized browser insert/move/delete/duplicate/edit/bind/undo/redo/save/reload cases pass.
extendedIssues.blockedCondition: No retained Page Studio E2E route, screenshot, permission-deny, responsive, or backend save trace.

extendedIssues.title: Runtime product acceptance
extendedIssues.passCondition: Runtime monitoring, canonical integrity and unknown-event rejection pass; local browser smoke is retained.
extendedIssues.blockedCondition: No authorized runtime API/UI trace, rollback rehearsal, accessibility/layout evidence, or final deletion scan.

extendedIssues.title: Data Studio product acceptance
extendedIssues.passCondition: Structured query model, current SQL editor and typed parameters pass; local SQLite chain is retained separately.
extendedIssues.blockedCondition: No four-provider credentials or authorized Data Studio API/UI evidence.

extendedIssues.title: Definition of Done and release sign-off
extendedIssues.localCommand: powershell -File docs/low-code-refactor/validate-acceptance-matrix.ps1; dotnet build AsterERP.sln --configuration Release --no-restore; npm run typecheck --prefix frontend/AsterERP.Web; npm run lint --prefix frontend/AsterERP.Web; npm run build --prefix frontend/AsterERP.Web
extendedIssues.passCondition: All local gates pass and every external/operational evidence item is retained with traceable status.
extendedIssues.blockedCondition: Maintenance window, operator authorization, backup/restore, external providers, authorized API/UI, accessibility/visual/performance, or deletion evidence is missing.
